description_long: This is a modern, rectangular storage cabinet featuring a two-tone design with a light wood finish on the top, sides, and back, and a darker wood finish on the front drawer section. The cabinet has two open shelves at the top, ideal for storing electronics or small items, and two large drawers below, each equipped with a curved metallic handle for easy access. The structure is supported by short, sturdy legs, providing stability and a slight elevation from the ground. The clean lines and minimalist aesthetic make it suitable for contemporary urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or residential living rooms. The materials appear to be engineered wood or laminate, with metal handles and internal air gaps in the drawers and shelves. No glass panels or visible contents are present, and the overall build suggests durability and functionality.
description: A modern two-tone cabinet with open shelves and two large drawers, featuring metallic handles and a sturdy, minimalist design. The light and dark wood finishes create a contemporary look suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves above two large drawers with curved metallic handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the light wood grain finish and the depth of the cabinet, with the drawers partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear-front view highlighting the full width of the drawers and both metallic handles, as well as the open shelf compartments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the light wood grain and the cabinet's depth.
